fields.name: area of effect behavior equipment#if a reference is here, area of effect damage will attach the equipment to the target
AOE core radius:world units#if >0 then higher fidelity obstruction collision checks are preformed. This field has no other ramifications.
active camouflage damage:[0,1]#how much more visible this damage makes a player who is active camouflaged
stun:[0,1]#amount of stun added to damaged unit
maximum stun:[0,1]#damaged unit's stun will never exceed this amount
stun time:seconds#duration of stun due to this damage
damage stun:ticks#how long we stun recovering current body damage

alt instantaneous acceleration:[0,+inf]#This field can be used for an alternative acceleration if the corresponding flags are set, e.g. check vehicle->flags.vehicle wants reduced weapon impulse when airborne
acceleration cap#set to zero to disable cap
soft ping pain screen scale:[0,1]#The maximum amount to apply the pain screen pose overlay
stasis time:ticks#duration of stasis due to this damage, zero disables
tree_of_life shield regen modifier#regen velocity of TOL:if non-1.0 this overrides any 'shield recharge rate' trait
minimum shield level:[0, 1]#when hit, shield will be reset to this percentage of full strength if it is below
shield stun time:seconds#time after damage applied before shield recharges
minimum health level:[0, 1]#when hit, health will be reset to this percentage of full health if it is below
health stun time:seconds#time after damage applied before health recharges
minimum energy level:[0, 1]#like above, TOL reset minimum equipment energy to this
maximum energy level:[0, 1]#cap equipment energy to this
equipment stun time:seconds#time after damage applied before equipment recharges
Modifies TOL logic so that (above) unstun will only happen if (below) minimum stun time has passed
breaking effect
fields.definition:
Controls particle velocities when a damage effect shatters a materal.

All particles created within 'forward radius' will be kicked along the
damage direction with a speed equivalent to 'forward velocity' at the
epicenter of the damage and 0 at the outer radius.  'Forward exponent'
is used to modify the velocity scale.  A low exponent (like 0.5) means that
particles between the epicenter and the radius will be kicked out with a speed
closer to 'forward velocity' than if a higher exponent (like 2.0) was used

The outward fields work in a similar way, except instead of kicking along the
damage direction, they get kick away from the damage epicenter.

fields.name: custom label#label used to control what damage response will fire.^

options: area damage players only#area of effect damage only affects players
affects model targets#distribute the damage amongst the model targets. this is the default behavior for aoe damage, but can be set here for direct damage.
default#uses code to figure out what vocalization to use
ignores headshot obstructions#arms, held weapons, attachments
does not hurt friends#affects aoe only
ignore seat scale for dir. dmg
forces hard ping if body dmg{forces hard ping}
does not cause biped aoe effect
apply tree of life#as if a tree of life was near 'victim'
causes incineration dissolve to dead units
force hard ping as attachment feedback#force a hard ping as a notification to the player that the sticky grenade has attached
